name: Nihil Attacks on Hyperspace Routes
description: The Nihil marauders terrorize hyperspace lanes during the Republic's golden age, threatening the expansion of the High Republic era.
outcome: Jedi Order repels the Nihil threat

name: Vergence at Brendok (Acolyte)
description: A mysterious Force vergence on Brendok leads to the creation of twin Force-sensitive girls, intertwining the fates of Osha and Mae with a hidden Sith Master.
outcome: Jedi investigation reveals a hidden Sith, shocking the Order

name: Blockade of Naboo
description: The Trade Federation blockades Naboo on orders from Darth Sidious, forcing the Galactic Republic into a political crisis and triggering a Jedi intervention.
outcome: Blockade broken; leads to the Battle of Naboo

name: Discovery of Anakin Skywalker
description: Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn discovers a young Anakin Skywalker on Tatooine, detecting unprecedented midi-chlorian levels and believing him to be the Chosen One of prophecy.
outcome: Anakin is brought before the Jedi Council; Qui-Gon defies the Council to train him

name: Battle of Naboo
description: The Naboo resistance and Gungan Grand Army fight to retake Naboo from the Trade Federation while Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi confront the Sith assassin Darth Maul.
outcome: Trade Federation defeated; Naboo liberated; Qui-Gon Jinn slain by Darth Maul

name: Duel of the Fates
description: Obi-Wan Kenobi and Qui-Gon Jinn duel Darth Maul in the Theed power generator. Qui-Gon is slain; Obi-Wan bisects Maul, who survives and falls into a shaft.
outcome: Qui-Gon Jinn dies; Maul cut in half but survives; Obi-Wan becomes Anakin's master

name: First Battle of Geonosis
description: The Jedi mount a rescue mission on Geonosis that escalates into the Clone Wars' first major battle. Yoda arrives with the newly revealed clone army, saving the Jedi but beginning the galaxy-wide conflict.
outcome: Jedi rescued; CIS forces retreat; Clone Wars officially begins

name: Battle of Christophsis
description: Republic forces under Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi defend Christophsis against Separatist invasion. Ahsoka Tano is assigned as Anakin's Padawan during this conflict.
outcome: Republic holds Christophsis; Ahsoka officially becomes Anakin's apprentice

name: Battle of Ryloth
description: The Republic battles to liberate the Twi'lek homeworld from Separatist occupation. Mace Windu leads ground forces while Anakin Skywalker destroys the blockade above.
outcome: Ryloth liberated from CIS occupation

name: Battle of Kamino
description: Separatist forces led by General Grievous attack Kamino to destroy the clone production facilities. Republic defenders repel the invasion, preserving the clone army.
outcome: Kamino cloning facilities defended; clone army preserved

name: Battle of Umbara
description: Clone troopers led by the treacherous General Krell fight a brutal campaign on the shadow world of Umbara. Krell is revealed as a traitor and executed by his own troops.
outcome: Umbara taken; General Krell revealed and executed for treason

name: Battle of Felucia
description: Republic forces fight to hold the bioluminescent jungle world of Felucia from Separatist control. Multiple campaigns are fought here throughout the Clone Wars.
outcome: Contested; Felucia changes hands multiple times

name: Massacre of the Nightsisters
description: Count Dooku orders General Grievous to exterminate the Nightsister clan on Dathomir after Mother Talzin's betrayal. The village is decimated, nearly wiping out the ancient order.
outcome: Nightsisters nearly annihilated; Ventress and Mother Talzin escape

name: Battle of Onderon
description: Ahsoka Tano, Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker train Onderon rebels to overthrow the Separatist-backed king. Saw Gerrera leads the resistance on the ground.
outcome: Onderon liberated; Saw Gerrera's resistance succeeds

name: Trial and Departure of Ahsoka Tano
description: Ahsoka Tano is falsely accused of bombing the Jedi Temple and tried for treason. Though exonerated, she is disillusioned by the Jedi Order's lack of faith and leaves the Order.
outcome: Ahsoka leaves the Jedi Order; fractures her relationship with Anakin

name: Siege of Mandalore
description: Ahsoka Tano and Captain Rex lead a Republic siege on Mandalore to capture Darth Maul. Maul is captured but the battle is cut short when Order 66 is executed mid-siege.
outcome: Maul captured briefly; Order 66 shatters the Republic during the siege itself

name: Battle of Coruscant
description: General Grievous launches a surprise attack on Coruscant, capturing Chancellor Palpatine. Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi lead a daring rescue above the city-planet.
outcome: Palpatine rescued; Count Dooku slain by Anakin; Grievous escapes

name: Death of Count Dooku
description: Anakin Skywalker executes a disarmed Count Dooku aboard the Invisible Hand at Palpatine's urging, taking his first step toward the dark side.
outcome: Dooku slain; Palpatine's manipulation of Anakin deepens

name: Duel in the Senate
description: Yoda confronts Darth Sidious in the Senate Chamber in an epic Force duel. Yoda is ultimately driven back and escapes into exile.
outcome: Yoda defeated and forced into exile on Dagobah

name: Execution of Order 66
description: Darth Sidious activates the clone troopers' inhibitor chips galaxy-wide. Clone soldiers turn on their Jedi Generals simultaneously across hundreds of worlds, killing most of the Jedi Order.
outcome: Over 10,000 Jedi slain; Jedi Order effectively destroyed

name: Duel on Mustafar
description: Obi-Wan Kenobi confronts his fallen apprentice Anakin Skywalker on the volcanic world of Mustafar. Anakin is dismembered and left for dead; Obi-Wan departs in grief.
outcome: Anakin defeated and burned; encased in Vader armor; becomes Darth Vader

name: Declaration of the Galactic Empire
description: Sheev Palpatine declares himself Emperor before the Galactic Senate, transforming the Republic into the Galactic Empire to thunderous applause.
outcome: Galactic Empire proclaimed; democracy ends; Padmé weeps as liberty dies

name: Birth of Luke and Leia Skywalker
description: Padmé Amidala gives birth to twins Luke and Leia on Polis Massa before dying. The twins are hidden to protect them from the Empire.
outcome: Padmé dies; twins hidden — Luke on Tatooine, Leia on Alderaan

name: Night of a Thousand Tears — Purge of Mandalore
description: The Galactic Empire deploys purge troopers and droids to systematically exterminate the Mandalorian people, nearly destroying their civilization and rendering Mandalore uninhabitable.
outcome: Mandalore devastated; Mandalorian culture nearly wiped out; Great Purge survivors scatter

name: Liberation of Lothal — Malachor Battle
description: Ahsoka Tano, Kanan Jarrus and Ezra Bridger discover an ancient Sith temple on Malachor. Ahsoka faces Darth Vader; Kanan is blinded; Ezra retrieves a Sith holocron.
outcome: Kanan blinded; Ahsoka's fate uncertain; Sith holocron acquired by Ezra

name: Siege of Atollon
description: Grand Admiral Thrawn traps the Phoenix rebel cell on Atollon with an impenetrable blockade. Ezra Bridger escapes to Mandalore to seek reinforcements while the fleet is devastated.
outcome: Rebel cell severely damaged; Ezra escapes; rebellion in disarray

name: Liberation of Lothal
description: Ezra Bridger orchestrates a daring plan to liberate his homeworld of Lothal from Imperial occupation, sacrificing himself to pull Grand Admiral Thrawn into hyperspace with purrgil.
outcome: Lothal freed; Ezra vanishes into hyperspace with Thrawn

name: Battle of Scarif
description: Rogue One steals the Death Star plans from the Imperial security complex on Scarif. The entire Rogue One team perishes, but the plans are transmitted to the Rebel Alliance.
outcome: Death Star plans stolen; entire Rogue One team dies; hope lives on

name: Destruction of Alderaan
description: Grand Moff Tarkin orders the Death Star to fire upon the peaceful world of Alderaan to demonstrate Imperial power. Two billion inhabitants die instantly.
outcome: Alderaan destroyed; 2 billion killed; Rebel resistance galvanized

name: Battle of Yavin
description: A small Rebel Alliance X-Wing squadron attacks the Death Star's thermal exhaust port. Luke Skywalker uses the Force to fire the proton torpedo that destroys the superweapon.
outcome: Death Star destroyed; Rebel Alliance victory; Empire shaken

name: Battle of Hoth
description: Darth Vader's fleet discovers Echo Base and launches a devastating assault. The Rebels conduct a fighting retreat under cover of snowspeeders while most escape to hyperspace.
outcome: Echo Base destroyed; Rebels evacuate; Han Solo captured shortly after

name: Duel in Cloud City
description: Luke Skywalker confronts Darth Vader in the carbon-freezing chamber of Cloud City. Luke loses his hand and lightsaber, and Vader reveals the shattering truth of his parentage.
outcome: Luke defeated; his hand severed; Han Solo frozen in carbonite; 'I am your father'

name: Han Solo Frozen in Carbonite
description: Han Solo is frozen in carbonite by Darth Vader and handed to Boba Fett as a bounty for Jabba the Hutt, leaving his friends helpless to stop him.
outcome: Han Solo frozen; delivered to Jabba; sets up rescue in Return of the Jedi

name: Battle of Endor
description: The Rebel Alliance launches a two-front assault on the second Death Star above Endor. Ewok allies help destroy the shield generator while the fleet fights above.
outcome: Death Star II destroyed; Emperor slain; Galactic Empire collapses

name: Redemption of Anakin Skywalker
description: Darth Vader saves Luke from the Emperor's Force lightning, throwing Palpatine into the Death Star's reactor shaft and sacrificing his own life. Anakin Skywalker is redeemed.
outcome: Palpatine dies; Vader redeemed; balance restored to the Force (temporarily)

name: Battle of Jakku
description: The New Republic fleet defeats the last major Imperial armada above Jakku, effectively ending the Galactic Civil War. The Imperial wreckage forms the Graveyard of Giants.
outcome: Empire's military destroyed; Galactic Concordance signed; Imperial era ends

name: Signing of the Galactic Concordance
description: The Galactic Concordance is signed on Chandrila, formally ending the Galactic Civil War. The Empire becomes the Imperial Remnant; the New Republic demilitarizes.
outcome: Official end of the Galactic Civil War; New Republic established

name: Discovery of Grogu on Arvala-7
description: Din Djarin tracks down and recovers the mysterious Force-sensitive child known as Grogu, a 50-year-old member of Yoda's species hidden since Order 66.
outcome: Grogu rescued from Imperial Remnant; becomes Din Djarin's foundling

name: Battle of Nevarro — First
description: Din Djarin and a motley crew of Mandalorian warriors assault an Imperial remnant base on Nevarro to recover Grogu, who had been recaptured by Moff Gideon.
outcome: Grogu rescued; IG-11 destroyed; Moff Gideon escapes with the Darksaber

name: Din Djarin's Duel for the Darksaber
description: Din Djarin defeats Moff Gideon in single combat aboard his cruiser and claims the Darksaber, making him the rightful ruler of Mandalore by Mandalorian law.
outcome: Din Djarin wins the Darksaber; Moff Gideon captured

name: Luke Skywalker's Jedi Temple Attack — Ben Solo's Fall
description: Ben Solo, corrupted by Supreme Leader Snoke, destroys Luke Skywalker's new Jedi Temple and massacres most of the students. Luke goes into self-imposed exile.
outcome: New Jedi Order destroyed; Ben Solo becomes Kylo Ren; Luke exiles himself

name: Destruction of Hosnian Prime
description: The First Order fires Starkiller Base's weapon across the galaxy, destroying the Hosnian system and annihilating the New Republic Senate and fleet in a single shot.
outcome: New Republic Senate and fleet destroyed; billions killed; Resistance is last hope

name: Battle of Takodana
description: First Order forces assault Maz Kanata's castle on Takodana searching for the map to Luke Skywalker. Kylo Ren captures Rey; Finn uses Anakin's lightsaber for the first time.
outcome: Castle destroyed; Rey captured; Han, Finn and Chewbacca escape

name: Death of Han Solo
description: Ben Solo/Kylo Ren kills his father Han Solo on Starkiller Base in an attempt to fully embrace the dark side and sever his connection to the light.
outcome: Han Solo slain; Kylo Ren further falls to darkness; Chewbacca enraged

name: Destruction of Starkiller Base
description: The Resistance launches a desperate assault on Starkiller Base. Poe Dameron destroys the thermal oscillator while Rey and Finn face Kylo Ren in a snowy forest duel.
outcome: Starkiller Base destroyed; Kylo Ren wounded; Rey discovers her Force power

name: Luke Skywalker's Force Projection — Battle of Crait
description: Luke Skywalker projects a Force illusion of himself across the galaxy to Crait, holding the First Order at bay and allowing the Resistance to escape, sacrificing his life.
outcome: Resistance escapes; Luke Skywalker dies becoming one with the Force

name: Death of Supreme Leader Snoke
description: Kylo Ren uses the Force to bisect Supreme Leader Snoke with Rey's lightsaber while he is distracted by a vision, taking power for himself as the new Supreme Leader.
outcome: Snoke dies; Kylo Ren becomes Supreme Leader; Rey and Kylo face Praetorian Guards

name: Battle of Exegol
description: Rey confronts resurrected Emperor Palpatine on Exegol while a makeshift fleet of civilian ships answers Lando's call to face the Sith Eternal's Final Order fleet.
outcome: Palpatine destroyed; Final Order fleet annihilated; galaxy-wide liberation begins

name: Redemption of Ben Solo
description: Leia Organa reaches out through the Force to her son Ben, breaking through his dark side allegiance. Ben Solo returns to the light and sacrifices himself to revive Rey.
outcome: Ben Solo redeemed; sacrifices his life force to revive Rey; dies in peace

name: The Mortis Prophecy — Anakin and the Force Realm
description: Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan and Ahsoka are drawn to the Force realm of Mortis, where the embodiments of the Force's light and dark sides test the Chosen One's destiny.
outcome: Anakin confirmed as the Chosen One; glimpses of his dark future revealed

name: Return of Ezra Bridger from Peridea
description: Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren travel across galaxies to Peridea to rescue Ezra Bridger, who has been stranded there for years after his sacrifice at Lothal.
outcome: Ezra Bridger returns; Thrawn escapes to the known galaxy

name: Obi-Wan and Vader's Rematch
description: A broken Obi-Wan Kenobi confronts Darth Vader for the first time since Mustafar, losing badly. But through renewed resolve, Obi-Wan defeats Vader in their second duel, making peace with his fallen apprentice.
outcome: Obi-Wan escapes; both wounded; Obi-Wan makes peace with Vader's choices
